bas_/Vault/Dotfiles Repo Workflow
● EVERGREEN NOTE dotfilesgitworkflowstow

Dotfiles Repo Workflow

Bare repo + GNU Stow workflow for ~/dotfiles.

PLANTED · 27 APRIL 2026 · ZETTEL NOTE

Bare repo + Stow workflow for ~/dotfiles.

Topology

  • Bare repo — ~/repos/dotfiles.git
  • Working tree — ~/dotfiles/
  • Symlinks — managed by GNU Stow into ~/.config/ and ~/

Add a config

cd ~/dotfiles
mkdir -p <pkg>/.config/<pkg>
mv ~/.config/<pkg>/* <pkg>/.config/<pkg>/
stow <pkg>
git add . && git commit -m "add: <pkg>"
git push

Edit

Edit through symlink or working tree — same file. Then commit.

Restow after structure change

stow -R <pkg>

Related

  • System Config MOC
↑ Vault All notes
